run_notes: First manual triage run executed in-session by operator + Claude. Surfaced 15 findings initially against a 23-day-stale MEMORY.md, then re-verified against live metrics.json + git log + grep, reducing to 8 real findings (the rest were stale-snapshot artifacts already resolved in code). The reality-correction step is the canonical pattern this skill should follow on every run.

ADR-096-resolution-text-ingest-no-slot.reality_check_signature: grep ADR-096 swarm-fund-mvp/DECISIONS.md -> zero matches; latest ADR is 106

grant-pipeline-zero-submissions-30d.reality_check_signature: grep submitted aeon/memory/topics/grants.md -> zero hits; AWS-Activate pitch-ready since 2026-05-08

phantom_findings_corrected_against_reali.runner_swarm_canary_frozen: FALSE — verified via rswarm.ai/metrics.json: 8+ runner_swarm variants are live in canary lifecycle (hl-fractal, pm-entropy-flow, pm-regime-shift, ta-macd-cross, hl-vol-momentum, hl-dynamic-vol-grid). PR #34 merged with all four Codex review P0/P1 fixes. Stale snapshot, not real drift.
phantom_findings_corrected_against_reali.9_stalled_PRs_on_tomscaria_aeon: FALSE — `gh pr list --state=open` shows recent (last 7d) feat/fix/docs PRs. The 9-stalled-PRs framing was about aaronjmars/aeon (upstream fork) or has been resolved. Snapshot artifact.
phantom_findings_corrected_against_reali.Apex_gate_29_of_100_2-3_weeks_ETA: FALSE — headline agent restructured. Now `calibration-gap-v1` at 42/100, Sharpe 0.19 (worse than 0.31 snapshot). Apex gate is FURTHER than the snapshot suggested, not closer. Numbers moved; lifecycle label `Revenant` is unused in live fleet.
phantom_findings_corrected_against_reali.PR_queue_stagnation: FALSE — 142 commits in 23 days on swarm-fund-mvp (including 6 new ADRs, 100-106), Aeon Batch 1-5 features + context pipeline shipped. Active work was rendered invisible by stale snapshot.

next_run_should: Auto-trigger when MEMORY.md mtime > 7d (see ISS-025 fix path 2)
Always read live metrics.json BEFORE classifying any P0 about trading state
Always run git log filtered for non-bot commits BEFORE classifying any 'queue stagnation' finding
Cross-reference DECISIONS.md latest ADR number against MEMORY.md mentions of ADR-XXX+ to catch slot-not-opened drift
Verify falsifier checks programmatically where possible (ls / grep / curl) before reporting
